ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial metric (e.g., 'all round_trips', 'winning', 'losing') */,
  "avg_returns" REAL /* Average return for the specified metric type */,
  "median_returns" REAL /* Median return for the specified metric type */,
  "period_start" TEXT /* Start date of the period for which the metric is calculated */,
  "period_end" TEXT /* End date of the period for which the metric is calculated */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades in the period */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return in the period */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return in the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, advisor, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_metrics" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial metric being compared */,
  "compared_company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company being compared to */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., performance, growth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening stock price for the company on that date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing stock price for the company on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest stock price for the company on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest stock price for the company on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Date range covered by the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who set the alert */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., notification preferences) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
